card.name: Animated Marionette
card.text: {3}: Transform Animated Marionette. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Humanized Sorceress

card.name: Humanized Sorceress
card.text: {2}: Humanized Sorceress gets +1/+1 until end of turn. --- (Front): Animated Marionette

card.name: Apprentice Witch
card.text: Prowess

card.name: Avarellian Elf
card.text: Ward {2}

card.name: Uyavian Paladin
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Lifelink Creatures paired with Uyavian Paladin have lifelink.

card.name: Sentence to Isolation
card.text: Enchant opponent At the beginning of enchanted player's upkeep, each of their opponents gains 2 life.

card.name: Azorian Sky-Priest
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Flying Creatures paired with Azorian Sky-Priest have flying.

card.name: Beloved Queen
card.text: When Beloved Queen enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Tranquil Moment
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact or enchantment. • Return target artifact or enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Merciful Caladrius
card.text: Flying When Merciful Caladrius enters, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Skullcrunching People-Eater
card.text: Sacrifice another creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on Skullcrunching People-Eater and you gain 2 life. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Childcatcher Witch
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Transform Childcatcher Witch. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Shadowmaster Hag

card.name: Shadowmaster Hag
card.text: Lifelink --- (Front): Childcatcher Witch

card.name: Clever Maidservant
card.text: Clever Maidservant can't be blocked as long as it's attacking a Quest.

card.name: Filton Giant
card.text: {2}{U}{U}: Filton Giant gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Unburden
card.text: Target player discards two cards. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Back to Back
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Each creature paired with it also gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Court Astrologer
card.text: When Court Astrologer enters, scry 2.

card.name: Bane of Vortheld
card.text: This spell costs {1}{B} less to cast for each creature with deathtouch you control. Flying, deathtouch

card.name: Reduce to Ruins
card.text: Destroy target artifact or land. Cycling {R} ({R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Wicked Blade
Overconfident Alchemist
card.text: When Overconfident Alchemist dies, it deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Eager Adventurer
card.text: Eager Adventurer has haste as long as you control a Quest.

card.name: Morossian Giant
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Trample Creatures paired with Morossian Giant have trample.

card.name: Egg Man
card.text: Trample, haste

card.name: Elderlify
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -2/-2. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Elf-Child
card.text: Ward {1} When Elf-Child attacks, transform it. --- (Back): Freedom-Lover

card.name: Freedom-Lover
card.text: Ward—Pay 1 life --- (Front): Elf-Child

card.name: Farajo's Intervention
card.text: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to creatures, players, or planeswalkers this turn. Cycling {2}

card.name: Hardhearted Oaf
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Menace Creatures paired with Hardhearted Oaf have menace.

card.name: Song of Summer
card.text: Song of Summer deals 3 damage to target creature or Quest.

card.name: Unexpected Adventure
card.text: Return target creature or Quest to its owner's hand. That player can't cast spells with the same name as that permanent until your next turn.

card.name: Man-Eating Snail
card.text: Man-Eating Snail enters tapped.

card.name: Gift of Paradise
card.text: Enchant land When Gift of Paradise enters, you gain 3 life. Enchanted land has "{T}: Add two mana of any one color."

card.name: Housecat Knight
card.text: When Housecat Knight enters, create a 0/1 white Human creature token.

card.name: Invigorating Drink
card.text: Tap any number of untapped creatures you control and put a +1/+1 counter on each of them. You gain 7 life. Cycling {G} ({G}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Knight of the Holy City
card.text: Cycling {W} ({W}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Larger Than Life
card.text: Target creature gets +4/+4 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Magical Mirror
card.text: Defender {2}, {T}: Scry 1.

card.name: Maiden of the Forest
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) {T}: Add one mana of any color. Creatures paired with Maiden of the Forest have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: Manflinger
card.text: Whenever Manflinger attacks, you may have another target attacking creature get +1/+0 and gain flying. If you do, sacrifice that creature at end of combat.

card.name: Arrogant Blackguard
card.text: When Arrogant Blackguard enters, if you control another Knight, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Mesa Unicorn
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Noble Steed
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Noble Steed attacks or blocks, target Knight you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Ornery Leprechaun
card.text: When Ornery Leprechaun enters, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Faebound Mage
card.text: When Faebound Mage dies, create a 1/1 blue Faerie Wizard creature token with flying.

card.name: Radiant Fountain
card.text: When Radiant Fountain enters, you gain 2 life. {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Royal Edict
card.text: Each opponent sacrifices a creature with the greatest power among creatures they control.

card.name: Seek Faerieland
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Seek Faerieland has no quest counters on it, sacrifice it and create two 1/1 blue Faerie Wizard creature tokens with flying.

card.name: Setting Fires
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Setting Fires has no quest counters on it, sacrifice it and it deals 4 damage to any target.

card.name: Slay the Monster
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Slay the Monster has no quest counters on it, sacrifice it and destroy target creature.

card.name: Retired Adventurer
card.text: When Retired Adventurer enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Disorder and Confusion
card.text: Up to three target creatures can't block this turn. Cycling {R} ({R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Wander in Death
card.text: Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand. Cycling {2}

card.name: Sprinkledust Pixie
card.text: Flying Whenever Sprinkledust Pixie attacks, another target attacking creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Spiderback Lizard
card.text: When Spiderback Lizard enters, create a 1/2 green Ouphe Spider creature token with reach.

card.name: Terramorphic Expanse
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Terramorphic Expanse: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Incompetent Despot
card.text: When Incompetent Despot dies, create a 4/4 white Noble creature token.

card.name: To See the World
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When To See the World has no quest counters on it, sacrifice it and draw three cards.

card.name: Seek Your Fortune
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Seek Your Fortune has no quest counters on it, sacrifice it and discard up to two cards. Draw that many cards and create that many Treasure tokens.

card.name: Underbridge Troll
card.text: {1}{G}: Underbridge Troll gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Valiant Protector
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Vigilance Creatures paired with Valiant Protector have vigilance.

card.name: Vicious Manticore
card.text: As long as it's your turn, Vicious Manticore has first strike.

card.name: Walk the Faerie Path
card.text: Target creature can't be blocked this turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Webweave Widow
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Reach Creatures paired with Webweave Widow have reach.

card.name: Whirlwind Romance
card.text: Untap target unpaired creature and gain control of it until end of turn. It gains haste until end of turn. Cycling {2}

card.name: Witch's Broomstick
Wolf of the Endless Forest
card.text: Wolf of the Endless Forest can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Cycling {G} ({G}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Writhing Rotworms
card.text: Deathtouch

card.name: Bearform Skinchanger
card.text: Trample --- (Front): Yaragi Skinchanger

card.name: Witch-Baroness
card.text: Prowess When Witch-Baroness enters, return target creature an opponent controls to its owner's hand.

card.name: Tranquil Thicket
card.text: Tranquil Thicket enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}. Cycling {G} ({G}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Forgotten Cave
card.text: Forgotten Cave enters tapped. {T}: Add {R}. Cycling {R} ({R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Barren Moor
card.text: Barren Moor enters tapped. {T}: Add {B}. Cycling {B} ({B}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Lonely Sandbar
card.text: Lonely Sandbar enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}. Cycling {U} ({U}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Secluded Steppe
card.text: Secluded Steppe enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}. Cycling {W} ({W}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Witch's Denial
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1}. If that player is cursed, counter that spell instead.

card.name: Yaragi Knight
card.text: As long as a player is enchanted, Yaragi Knight has vigilance and lifelink.

card.name: Blight Egg
card.text: When Blight Egg dies, create two 1/1 black Insect creature tokens.

card.name: Crowd of Peasants
card.text: Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Crowd of Peasants.

card.name: King of Thieves
card.text: When King of Thieves enters, create a Treasure token. Each opponent sacrifices a Treasure.

card.name: Explosive Potion
card.text: Explosive Potion deals 3 damage to each opponent, each planeswalker an opponent controls, and each Quest you control. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: A Challenge!
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature with the greatest power among creatures your opponents control. Draw a card.

card.name: Arrogant Prince
card.text: {B}, Tap an untapped Wizard you control: Transform Arrogant Prince. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Accursed Beast

card.name: Accursed Beast
card.text: Menace At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life. --- (Front): Arrogant Prince

card.name: Seek Excitement
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Seek Excitement has no quest counters on it, sacrifice it. After your next end of combat step, untap all creatures you control, then there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Sentence to Serenity
card.text: Enchant opponent Creatures enchanted player controls gets -1/-0.

card.name: Cry Wolf
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. Untap them unless there's a card named Cry Wolf in your graveyard.

card.name: Cunning Fox
card.text: Whenever Cunning Fox attacks, target creature blocks target attacking creature this turn if able.

card.name: Sentence to Honesty
card.text: Enchant opponent When Sentence to Honesty enters, draw a card. Enchanted player plays with their hand revealed.

card.name: Cherished Armor
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+2. When equipped creature dies, you may transform Cherished Armor. Equip {1} --- (Back): Haunted Armor

card.name: Haunted Armor
card.text: Flying --- (Front): Cherished Armor

card.name: Deathbringer Faerie
card.text: Flash Flying When Deathbringer Faerie enters, up to one target creature gets -X/-0 or -0/-X until end of turn, where X is the number of Wizards you control.

card.name: Disguised Wolf
card.text: {4}{G}{G}: Transform Disguised Wolf. --- (Back): Ferocious Wolf

card.name: Ferocious Wolf
card.text: When this creature transforms into Ferocious Wolf, it gets +2/+2 until end of turn. --- (Front): Disguised Wolf

card.name: Disproportionate Punishment
card.text: Disproportionate Punishment deals 5 damage to target tapped creature.

card.name: Spidery Friends
card.text: Create two 1/2 green Ouphe Spider creature tokens with reach. Basic Forestcycling {0} (Discard this card: Search your library for a basic Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.) If you control a land, you can't cycle Spidery Friends.

card.name: Spirit of Summer
card.text: Haste When Spirit of Summer dies while attacking, it deals 3 damage to the permanent or player it was attacking.

card.name: Hero of Many Stories
card.text: Hero of Many Stories attacks each combat if able. Questcycling {1}{R} ({1}{R}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Quest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Flicker-Flitter
card.text: Flash Flying When Flicker-Flitter enters, you may exile target untapped creature, then return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control.

card.name: Gingerbread House
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice Gingerbread House: You gain 3 life. Tap any number of untapped creatures you control and put a +1/+1 counter on each of them. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Goose That Lays Golden Eggs
card.text: Flying {T}: Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Gustbreath Wolf
card.text: Reach When Gustbreath Wolf enters, destroy target nonbasic land or creature with flying.

card.name: Impulsive Rake
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Paired creatures you control have haste.

card.name: Innocent Princess
card.text: Protection from creatures

card.name: Journey to the Underworld
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Journey to the Underworld has no quest counters on it, sacrifice it and return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: King of Beasts
card.text: Other Ouphes you control get +1/+1. King of Beasts gets +1/+1 for each other Ouphe you control.

card.name: Azor's Curse
card.text: Enchant opponent At the beginning of enchanted player's upkeep, each of their opponents creates a 1/1 black Mercenary creature token.

card.name: Master Poisoner
card.text: Deathtouch If a creature with deathtouch you control would deal damage to a player or planeswalker, it deals that much damage plus two instead.

card.name: Mechanical Girl
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Tap an untapped creature paired with Mechanical Girl: Put a +1/+1 counter on Mechanical Girl.

card.name: Chivalrous Mantis
card.text: Vigilance, trample

card.name: Morossian Viper
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Deathtouch Creatures paired with Morossian Viper have deathtouch.

card.name: Witch's Doom
card.text: Enchant creature You control enchanted creature. Enchanted creature is a Beast with base power and toughness 6/6. It loses all abilities and all other creature types.

card.name: New Adventures
card.text: Search your graveyard, hand, and library for up to three Quest cards with different names and put them onto the battlefield. Then shuffle. Cycling {2}

card.name: Go Utterly Mad
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has haste. At the beginning of combat on each player's turn, that player untaps enchanted creature and gains control of it. (It can't marry.)

card.name: Fantasian Giant
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Trample As long as Fantasian Giant is paired with a creature, it gets +X/+X, where X is that creature's power.

card.name: Overprotective Wife
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Sacrifice Overprotective Wife: Each creature paired with Overprotective Wife gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Preacher of Love
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Paired creatures you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Spoiled Heir
card.text: Spoiled Heir can't block. When another Noble you control dies, transform Spoiled Heir. --- (Back): Fearsome Tyrant

card.name: Fearsome Tyrant
card.text: Creatures you control have menace. --- (Front): Spoiled Heir

card.name: Oathbound of Gaheris
card.text: First strike, haste When Oathbound of Gaheris enters, Knights you control get +1/+0 and gain your choice of lifelink, vigilance, or menace until end of turn.

card.name: Princess of the Sea
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) At the beginning of your upkeep, if Princess of the Sea is paired with a non-Merfolk creature, transform it. --- (Back): Queen of the Land

card.name: Queen of the Land
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, transform Queen of the Land unless it's paired. Creatures paired with Queen of the Land can't be blocked. --- (Front): Princess of the Sea

card.name: Dragon Raid
card.text: Dragon Raid deals 3 damage divided as you choose among one, two, or three targets.

card.name: Slimy Frog
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) At the beginning of your upkeep, if Slimy Frog is paired with a Noble, transform it. --- (Back): Beautiful Princess

card.name: Beautiful Princess
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Creatures paired with Beautiful Princess get +2/+2. --- (Front): Slimy Frog

card.name: Spirit of Winter
card.text: {T}: Untap target land you control. Put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Speak the True Name
card.text: Counter target spell. Basic Islandcycling {0} (Discard this card: Search your library for a basic Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.) If you control a land, you can't cycle Speak the True Name.

card.name: Stealing Dragon Eggs
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Stealing Dragon Eggs has no quest counters on it, sacrifice it and create a 4/4 red Dragon creature token with flying.

card.name: Witch's Throne
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {6}, {T}: Transform Witch's Throne. --- (Back): Liberated Sphinx

card.name: Liberated Sphinx
card.text: Flying, vigilance --- (Front): Witch's Throne

card.name: The Power of Love
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a creature card with marriage or you control an unpaired creature with marriage. Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Travelling Salesman
card.text: When Travelling Salesman enters, choose one — • You draw a card and you lose 1 life. • You draw two cards and you lose 4 life. • You draw three cards and you lose 9 life.

card.name: Turn to Frog
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature loses all abilities and becomes a blue Frog with base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: Undoing the Wizard's Work
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Undoing the Wizard's Work has no quest counters on it, sacrifice it and put up to one target nonland permanent into its owner's library second from the top.

card.name: Unhappy Ending
card.text: Exile target creature or Quest.

card.name: Equestrian Exemplar
card.text: When Equestrian Exemplar enters, you may exile another creature you control until it leaves the battlefield. Equestrian Exemplar gets +2/+2 as long as there's a card exiled with it. It has vigilance if that card is a Horse, lifelink if it's a Unicorn, and flying if it's a Pegasus.

card.name: Walking Cottage
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}: Walking Cottage becomes a 2/2 Construct artifact creature until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: Wedded Warriors
card.text: Double strike Wedded Warriors can block an additional creature. When Wedded Warriors dies, return it to the battlefield transformed. --- (Back): War Widow

card.name: War Widow
card.text: First strike War Widow attacks each combat if able. --- (Front): Wedded Warriors

card.name: Guardian of the Endless Forest
Witch's Enforcer
card.text: Hexproof from cursed players Witch's Enforcer can't be blocked as long as the defending player is cursed.

card.name: Curious Egg
card.text: Defender Prevent all combat damage that Curious Egg would deal. At the beginning of your upkeep, put a +1/+1 counter on Curious Egg. Then you may transform it. --- (Back): Newborn Glatisant

card.name: Newborn Glatisant
card.text: Trample Newborn Glatisant attacks each combat if able. --- (Front): Curious Egg

card.name: You Shall Not Pass
Silverblade Baroness
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Double strike, vigilance, lifelink Creatures paired with Silverblade Baroness have double strike, vigilance, and lifelink.

card.name: Steal from the Rich
card.text: If target opponent controls more lands than you, create a number of Treasure tokens equal to the difference. Cycling {W} ({W}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Stop the World
card.text: Tap all creatures and put time counters on them. They don't untap during their controllers' untap steps for as long as they have time counters on them.

card.name: Vortheld Dragon
card.text: Flying When Vortheld Dragon enters, you may exile another target creature or artifact until Vortheld Dragon leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Entrancing Melody
card.text: Gain control of target creature with mana value X.

card.name: Smallest Astrologist
card.text: {T}, Tap an untapped Wizard you control: Scry 2, then draw a card.

card.name: Unwaking Dreamer
card.text: Flying {2}, Return Unwaking Dreamer to its owner's hand: Create a 5/5 blue Illusion creature token with flying and "When this creature becomes the target of a spell, sacrifice it."

card.name: Mirror-Maiden
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) {1}{U}: Mirror-Maiden becomes a copy of target creature paired with it. It gains marriage and this ability. It's still named Mirror-Maiden.

card.name: Descendant of Azor
card.text: Flying When Descendant of Azor enters, an opponent looks at the top three cards of your library and tells you their combined mana value and how many are of each color. Choose three card names, then exile those cards and put each with one of the chosen names into your hand.

card.name: Time Bubble
card.text: Take an extra turn after this one. During that turn, your opponents and permanents your opponents control have protection from you. Exile Time Bubble.

card.name: To the Moon!
card.text: Prevent all damage that would be dealt to To the Moon! by sources without flying. When To the Moon! has no quest counters on it, transform it. Cycling {U} --- (Back): Elua, Moon Goddess

card.name: Elua, Moon Goddess
card.text: Flying, hexproof, indestructible You may look at each player's hand and library. When Elua leaves the battlefield, each player shuffles. --- (Front): To the Moon!

card.name: All-Consuming Void
card.text: At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player exiles two permanents they control. If they can't, they lose the game.

card.name: Contest for the Crown
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Contest for the Crown has no quest counters on it, exile it and return it to the battlefield transformed. Then create two tapped 2/2 black Zombie creature tokens. --- (Back): Dark Lord of Vrek

card.name: Dark Lord of Vrek
card.text: Enchant creature you control Enchanted creature gets +2/+1 and is a Noble in addition to its other types. When enchanted creature leaves the battlefield, return Dark Lord of Vrek to the battlefield. (As a Quest.) --- (Front): Contest for the Crown

card.name: Supreme Merchant
card.text: Sacrifice a creature: Gain 3 life. Pay 4 life: Draw a card. Discard a card: Add {B}. {B}{B}: Create a tapped 1/1 black Mercenary creature token.

card.name: Royal Vizier
card.text: When Royal Vizier enters, create a 5/5 black Demon creature token with flying. Sacrifice a Noble: Transform Royal Vizier. --- (Back): Dictatorial Diabolist

card.name: Dictatorial Diabolist
card.text: Menace At the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice a non-Demon creature and create a 5/5 black Demon creature token with flying. --- (Front): Royal Vizier

card.name: A Contract With Lightning
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, A Contract With Lightning deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Uyavian Midwife
card.text: When Uyavian Midwife enters, search your library for an Egg card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then shuffle.

card.name: Needless Crusade
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Needless Crusade has no quest counters on it, sacrifice it and it deals 6 damage to each creature.

card.name: Journey of Self-Discovery
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Journey of Self-Discovery has no quest counters on it, sacrifice it. Then each player discards their hand and draws seven cards.

card.name: Treasure-Hoard Dragon
card.text: Flying When Treasure-Hoard Dragon enters, create four tapped Treasure tokens. Each opponent creates two. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Stephen the Many-Headed
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Stephen the Many-Headed enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. Creatures paired with Stephen get +1/+1 for each +1/+1 counter on Stephen.

card.name: Green Knight
card.text: When Green Knight enters, each opponent chooses a creature they control. Green Knight fights any number of those creatures.

card.name: Jousting Grounds
card.text: When Jousting Grounds enters, draw a card. Creatures can't be blocked by more than one creature.

card.name: Tarrasque
card.text: Trample When Tarrasque dies, return it to the battlefield at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Pious Farmer
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, scry 1. Then if you gained 3 or more life, draw a card. Then if you gained 7 or more life, create a token that's a copy of Pious Farmer.

card.name: Cook and Eat
card.text: Cook and Eat deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If it would die this turn, instead exile it, then tap any number of untapped creatures you control and put a +1/+1 counter on each of them.

card.name: Enchanted Summer
card.text: Whenever a player taps a land for mana, that player adds one mana of any type that land produced. At the end of your turn, transform Enchanted Summer. --- (Back): Enchanted Winter

card.name: Enchanted Winter
card.text: Players can't untap more than one land during their untap steps. At the end of your turn, transform Enchanted Winter. --- (Front): Enchanted Summer

card.name: Luton, Usurper King
card.text: Creatures you control but don't own get +1/+1 and have hexproof, haste and menace. When Luton enters, gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature.

card.name: Gaheris, Slayer of Heretics
card.text: First strike, vigilance, menace, haste Whenever Gaheris attacks, you may return target Knight creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped and attacking.

card.name: Janjahar the All-Consuming
card.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Destroy target land. Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Kath, Young Adventurer
card.text: Haste Whenever Kath deals damage to a Quest, transform Kath. --- (Back): Kath, Veteran Adventurer

card.name: Kath, Veteran Adventurer
card.text: Double strike, prowess When Kath leaves the battlefield, return all Quest cards from your graveyard to your hand. --- (Front): Kath, Young Adventurer

card.name: Mitling Mage
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, target player loses 3 life. Whenever you draw your fourth card each turn, destroy target creature. Whenever you draw your twelfth card each turn, target player loses the game.

card.name: Nameless God of Crawling Things
card.text: Indestructible, deathtouch Nameless God of Crawling Things can't attack or block unless you control at least two Insects, Leeches, Scorpions, Slugs, Snails, Spiders, and/or Worms. Insects, Leeches, Scorpions, Slugs, Snails, Spiders, and Worms you control get +2/+2.

card.name: Nathalie, Heretic Priestess
card.text: Each creature you control is paired with each other creature you control.

card.name: Uya, Phelddagrif Queen
card.text: {G}: Uya gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn. Target opponent creates a 1/1 green Ouphe Hippo creature token. {W}: Uya gains vigilance and lifelink until end of turn. Target opponent gains 2 life. {U}: Uya gains flying and hexproof until end of turn. Target opponent draws a card.

card.name: Sword of Kings
Desolate Marsh
card.text: Desolate Marsh enters tapped. {T}: Add {B}. {3}{B}{B}, {T}: Transform Desolate Marsh. --- (Back): Castle Vrek

card.name: Castle Vrek
card.text: {T}, Exile a creature card from your graveyard: Create a tapped 2/2 black Zombie creature token. {T}: Add {B}, plus an additional {B} for each card exiled with Castle Vrek. --- (Front): Desolate Marsh

card.name: Slumbering Volcano
card.text: Slumbering Volcano enters tapped. {T}: Add {R}. {4}{R}{R}{R}, {T}: Transform Slumbering Volcano. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Reviroa Awakened

card.name: Reviroa Awakened
card.text: When this card transforms into Reviroa Awakened, it deals 4 damage to each creature and planeswalker. {T}: Add {R}{R}{R}. --- (Front): Slumbering Volcano

card.name: Magnificent City
card.text: Magnificent City enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}. {4}{W}{W}, {T}: Transform Magnificent City. --- (Back): Artem, the Bottled Kingdom

card.name: Artem, the Bottled Kingdom
card.text: {T}: Exile target creature you control. {T}: Add {W}{W}. You may cast creature cards exiled with Artem, the Bottled Kingdom. --- (Front): Magnificent City

card.name: Lost Woods
card.text: Lost Woods enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}. {2}{G}{G}, {T}: Transform Lost Woods. --- (Back): The Endless Forest

card.name: The Endless Forest
card.text: ({T}: Add {G}.) When this permanent transforms into The Endless Forest, search your library for any number of Forest cards and exile them. Then shuffle. You may play cards exiled with The Endless Forest. --- (Front): Lost Woods

card.name: Vortheld Pegasus
card.text: Flying Basic Plainscycling {0} (Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.) If you control a land, you can't cycle Vortheld Pegasus.

card.name: Command Flame
card.text: Command Flame deals 4 damage to any target. Basic Mountaincycling {0} (Discard this card: Search your library for a basic Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.) If you control a land, you can't cycle Command Flame.

card.name: Vasilisa Ilyina
card.text: Vasilisa Ilyina becomes a legendary 3/3 Wolf creature with haste, indestructible, and "this creature must be blocked if able" until end of turn. Vasilisa Ilyina becomes a legendary 5/5 Wurm creature with haste, trample, and indestructible until end of turn. If Vasilisa Ilyina has seven or more loyalty counters on her, exile her and return her to the battlefield transformed. --- (Back): Vasilisa, Firstborn-Form

card.name: Vasilisa, Firstborn-Form
card.text: Indestructible, trample, reach, vigilance, haste Vasilisa, Firstborn-Form has hexproof unless she's attacking. --- (Front): Vasilisa Ilyina

card.name: Mitling House
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {4}: Transform Mitling House. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Seven-League Boots

card.name: Seven-League Boots
card.text: Equipped creature has first strike and haste. Equip {1} --- (Front): Mitling House

card.name: Beeback Paladin
card.text: Flying, deathtouch {1}: Beeback Paladin gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Morossian Curse-Breaker
card.text: {1}{G}, Sacrifice Morossian Curse-Breaker: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Ingenious Fool
card.text: Haste {T}: Another target creature with power 2 or less can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Declare Dominance
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn. All creatures able to block it this turn do so.

card.name: Elusive Glatisant
card.text: Tap an untapped creature you control: That creature fights Elusive Glatisant. When Elusive Glatisant dies this turn, return it to the battlefield transformed and attach it to that creature. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Fame and Glory

card.name: Fame and Glory
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +3/+3, has vigilance and hexproof, and is a Noble in addition to its other types. --- (Front): Elusive Glatisant

card.name: Courtly Lover
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Vigilance Whenever Courtly Lover attacks or blocks, if it's paired with a creature that isn't attacking or blocking, it gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Five Impossible Tasks
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Five Impossible Tasks has no quest counters on it, transform it and pair it with a creature you control. --- (Back): Princess Zineva

card.name: Princess Zineva
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Indestructible, ward {3} Creatures paired with Princess Zineva have indestructible and ward {3}. --- (Front): Five Impossible Tasks

card.name: Treasure AVA
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Dragon AVA
card.text: Flying

card.name: Faerie Wizard AVA
card.text: Flying

card.name: Ouphe Spider AVA
card.text: Reach

card.name: Illusion AVA
card.text: Flying When this creature becomes the target of a spell, sacrifice it.

card.name: Dream Logic
card.text: Nontoken creatures assign combat damage equal to their mana value rather than their power. Cycling {R}

card.name: Dub
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2, has first strike, and is a Knight in addition to its other types.

card.name: Valor of the Faithful
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain lifelink until end of turn. Creatures you control with lifelink get +3/+3 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Radiant Monarch
card.text: Lifelink When Radiant Monarch dies, return it to the battlefield transformed. --- (Back): Wounded Monarch

card.name: Wounded Monarch
card.text: Whenever you gain 2 or more life, transform Wounded Monarch. --- (Front): Radiant Monarch

card.name: Farajo, the Mediator
card.text: Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, draw a card and put a loyalty counter on Farajo, the Mediator. (Creating a token isn't casting a spell.) You gain 3 life. Create a white Aura enchantment token named Pacifism attached to target creature. The token has enchant creature and "enchanted creature can't attack or block".

card.name: Silent Knight
card.text: Deathtouch, menace Basic Swampcycling {0} (Discard this card: Search your library for a basic Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.) If you control a land, you can't cycle Silent Knight.

card.name: Coven Leader
card.text: {T}, Tap two untapped Wizards you control: Target player loses 4 life and you gain 4 life.

card.name: Prince Valhon
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink When Prince Valhon dies, return it to the battlefield transformed. --- (Back): Rescue the Prince

card.name: Rescue the Prince
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Rescue the Prince has no quest counters on it, transform it. --- (Front): Prince Valhon

card.name: Live Happily Ever After
card.text: When Live Happily Ever After enters, choose two target creatures that are unpaired or paired with each other. Exile them until Live Happily Ever After leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Befriend
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack you or a permanent you control. (It can still go on Quests.) Enchanted creature can't block creatures you control.

card.name: Good Luck Charm
card.text: Sacrifice Good Luck Charm: Equipped creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Equip {1}

card.name: Aggressive Instinct
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.

card.name: Treacherous Scorpion
card.text: Deathtouch

card.name: Search for the Lamp
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Search for the Lamp has no quest counters on it, put three wish counters on it and transform it. --- (Back): Hassalam the Omnipotent

card.name: Hassalam the Omnipotent
card.text: Flying Remove a wish counter from Hassalam the Omnipotent: Choose one — • Return target creature to its owner's hand. • Create two tapped Treasure tokens. • Draw a card. --- (Front): Search for the Lamp

card.name: Sleep Forever
card.text: Enchant creature When Sleep Forever enters, tap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step. When enchanted creature is paired, sacrifice Sleep Forever and draw a card.

card.name: Gruff Goat
card.text: Vigilance, trample Gruff Goat enters with X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the amount of life you've gained this turn.

card.name: Punisher of Heresy
card.text: As Punisher of Heresy enters, choose a card name. Whenever a player activates an ability of a permanent with the chosen name, if it isn't a mana ability, Punisher of Heresy deals 6 damage to that player.

card.name: Macabre Groom
card.text: Marriage Sacrifice another creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on Macabre Groom and each creature paired with it.

card.name: Wicked Stepfather
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Menace Sacrifice a creature paired with Wicked Stepfather: Wicked Stepfather gets +3/+3 until end of turn.

card.name: Suspicious Atoll
card.text: Suspicious Atoll enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}. {5}{U}{U}, {T}: Transform Suspicious Atoll. --- (Back): The Aspidochelone

card.name: The Aspidochelone
card.text: Trample --- (Front): Suspicious Atoll

card.name: Curse of Vrek
card.text: Enchant opponent Whenever a nontoken creature enchanted player controls dies, create a tapped 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Costly Plunder
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature. Draw two cards.

card.name: Draconic Consort
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) Flying Creatures paired with Draconic Consort get +3/+2, have flying, and are Dragons in addition to their other types.

card.name: Bride of the Nameless God
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) At the beginning of your end step, create a token that's a copy of a creature paired with Bride of the Nameless God, except it isn't legendary if that creature is legendary.

card.name: Ugly Duckling
card.text: Flying {3}{W}{W}: Transform Ugly Duckling. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Swan King

card.name: Swan King
card.text: Flying, lifelink When this creature transforms into Swan King, create two 1/1 white Ouphe Bird creature tokens with flying and lifelink. --- (Front): Ugly Duckling

card.name: Goldenplate Paladin
card.text: When Goldenplate Paladin dies, return it to the battlefield transformed. --- (Back): Inherited Wargear

card.name: Inherited Wargear
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1. If it's a Knight, it gets +2/+2 instead. Equip {3} --- (Front): Goldenplate Paladin

card.name: Sentence to Regret
card.text: Enchant opponent Enchanted player can't cast spells that share a name with a card in their graveyard.

card.name: Meaningless Violence
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature you control gains "When this creature dies, draw two cards". Then it fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: A King's Ransom
card.text: When A King's Ransom enters, create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.") Tap two untapped Treasures you control: Create a 1/1 black Mercenary creature token. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Test of Character
card.text: Each player may draw two cards. Each player who does loses 2 life, and each player who doesn't gains 4 life. Draw a card.

card.name: Demon AVA
card.text: Flying

card.name: Giant Slayer
card.text: Whenever Giant Slayer deals damage to a creature with power 4 or greater, destroy that creature.

card.name: Cavalier Cavalier
card.text: Cavalier Cavalier attacks each combat if able unless it's paired.

card.name: Dark Lord's Orders
card.text: Untap target creature and gain control of it until end of turn. It gains haste until end of turn. When it dies this turn, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Quest for the Holy Blade
card.text: (You can attack this. Opponents block for this. Damage removes counters.) When Quest for the Holy Blade has no quest counters on it, transform it. --- (Back): The Firesword of Artemy

card.name: The Firesword of Artemy
card.text: Equipped creature gets +5/+0 and has first strike and trample. Equip {0} --- (Front): Quest for the Holy Blade

card.name: Tranquility
card.text: Destroy all enchantments.

card.name: Skinchanger's Talisman
card.text: Equipped creature is a Cat with base power and toughness 4/4, has trample, and loses all other abilities and creature types. Equip {2}

card.name: Wishing Fish
card.text: {T}, Shuffle Wishing Fish into its owner's library: Reveal a noncreature card you own from outside the game and put it into your hand.

card.name: Magnificent Heist
card.text: Look at the top six cards of target opponent's library, exile two of them, and put the rest into their owner's graveyard. You may cast those cards for as long as they remain exiled and may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to do so.

card.name: Lady of the Lake
card.text: When Lady of the Lake enters, search your library for an Equipment or Quest card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then shuffle.

card.name: Merchant Prince
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, exile the top card of your library. Each player secretly bids an amount of life. The winner loses that much life and may play the card as long as it remains exiled, spending mana as though it were mana of any type to do so. You decide who wins ties.

card.name: Holy Fire
card.text: Holy Fire deals X damage to any target. You gain X life.

card.name: Peasant Revolt
card.text: Create ten 1/1 red Peasant creature tokens with haste and "This creature attacks each combat if able".

card.name: Peasant AVA
card.text: Haste This creature attacks each combat if able.

card.name: Nathalian Heretic
card.text: Trample Nathalian Heretic gets +1/+0 for each paired creature you control.

card.name: Witch's Heir
card.text: Flying, prowess Whenever Witch's Heir attacks, up to one target creature loses all abilities and becomes a 1/1 Frog until end of turn.

card.name: Return to Childhood
Tyrant's Mark
card.text: Enchant creature At the beginning of each upkeep, put a blight counter on Tyrant's Mark. Enchanted creature gets -1/-1 for each blight counter on Tyrant's Mark. When enchanted creature dies, return Tyrant's Mark to the battlefield transformed. --- (Back): Children of the Nameless God

card.name: Children of the Nameless God
card.text: Flying, deathtouch When Children of the Nameless God enters, search your library for a card named Tyrant's Mark and put it into your hand. Then shuffle. --- (Front): Tyrant's Mark

card.name: Dragon-Kissed Princess
card.text: Marriage (At beginning of combat, you may pair this monogamously with another creature for as long as you control both.) {R}: Dragon-Kissed Princess or a creature paired with it gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Unworthy Usurper
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life and create a 1/1 black Insect creature token.

card.name: Search the Stories
card.text: Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard an enchantment card.

card.name: Dubious Potion
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+1 and gains deathtouch until end of turn. If it's a Wizard, it also gains indestructible and lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Mighty Castle
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}: Mighty Castle becomes a 0/5 Wall artifact creature with defender until end of turn.

card.name: Faerie Godmother
card.text: Flying When Faerie Godmother enters, you may search your library for an Aura card, reveal it, and put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Queen of the Fair Folk
card.text: Ward {4} {1}: Target land becomes a 5/5 Elemental creature with trample and haste until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: Magical Loom
card.text: {2}, {T}: Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Miserly Dwarf-Lord
card.text: When Miserly Dwarf-Lord dies, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Royal Garden
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}: Put a growth counter on Royal Garden. Then if there are three or more growth counters on Royal Garden, remove them all and transform it. --- (Back): Skyscraping Beanstalk

card.name: Skyscraping Beanstalk
card.text: {T}: Add three mana of any one color. --- (Front): Royal Garden

card.name: Wise Owl
card.text: Flying {3}{U}: Scry 1.

card.name: Demon of Temptation
card.text: Flying, lifelink When Demon of Temptation enters, each player may search their library for a card and put it into their hand. Each player that does loses 6 life and shuffles. Each player that doesn't gains 6 life.

card.name: Witch-Queen Yarag
card.text: Prowess Curse spells you cast cost {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} less to cast. This effect reduces only the amount of colored mana you pay. Whenever you cast a Curse spell, you may draw a card.

card.name: Impoverished Village
card.text: Impoverished Village enters tapped. {T}: Add {R}. {T}, Sacrifice three Treasures: Transform Impoverished Village. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Prosperous City

card.name: Prosperous City
card.text: When this land transforms into Prosperous City, add {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}. {T}: Add two mana of any one color. --- (Front): Impoverished Village

card.name: Oppressed Kingdom
card.text: Oppressed Kingdom enters tapped. {T}: Add {B}. {T}, Tap an untapped Noble you control, sacrifice another Noble: Transform Oppressed Kingdom. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Liberated Kingdom

card.name: Liberated Kingdom
card.text: When this land transforms into Liberated Kingdom, draw three cards. {T}: Add two mana of any one color. --- (Front): Oppressed Kingdom

card.name: A School For Witches
card.text: A School For Witches enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}. {T}, Sacrifice two Quests: Transform A School For Witches. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Yaragi Fief

card.name: Yaragi Fief
card.text: When this land transforms into Yaragi Fief, create two 2/2 blue Human Wizard Noble creature tokens. {T}: Add two mana of any one color. --- (Front): A School For Witches

card.name: Accursed Barony
card.text: Accursed Barony enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}. {T}, Sacrifice two Curses: Transform Accursed Barony. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Utopian Barony

card.name: Utopian Barony
card.text: When this land transforms into Utopian Barony, you gain 12 life. {T}: Add two mana of any one color. --- (Front): Accursed Barony

card.name: Untamed Wilderness
card.text: Untamed Wilderness enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}. {T}, Tap two untapped Ouphes you control: Transform Untamed Wilderness. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Uyavian Province

card.name: Uyavian Province
card.text: When this land transforms into Uyavian Province, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. {T}: Add two mana of any one color. --- (Front): Untamed Wilderness

card.name: Ouphe Bird AVA
card.text: Flying, lifelink

card.name: Pacifism AVA
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block.

card.name: Pious Farmer (Token) AVA
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, scry 1. Then if you gained 3 or more life, draw a card. Then if you gained 7 or more life, create a token that's a copy of Pious Farmer.
